title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
description: I have a fundamental understanding of IT services and their uses in the AWS Cloud. I demonstrated cloud fluency and foundational AWS knowledge. I am able to identify essential AWS services necessary to set up AWS-focused projects.

title: AWS Educate Introduction to Generative AI
description: I have the skills to deploy applications, monitor operations, and manage enterprise solutions on AWS. I demonstrated proficiency in using AWS Console and the command-line interface to perform common platform-based tasks.
